# TechMate4u

> We engineer highly interactive, conversion-optimized websites and AI-integrated digital systems that accelerate business growth.

## About Us

TechMate4u is a premium digital product studio and web engineering agency based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. We specialize in building next-generation digital systems, high-performance websites, custom ERP solutions, restaurant POS systems, and AI-powered automation tools. We work with startups, SMBs, and growing businesses worldwide using a startup-friendly, transparent engagement model.

- Founded: Ahmedabad, India
- Email: info@techmate4u.com
- Phone: +91 93272 63267
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919327263267

## Core Services

### Website Design & Development
Custom-built, responsive websites engineered with Next.js and React that showcase your brand and drive measurable conversions. We deliver 99+ Lighthouse performance, accessibility, and best-practices scores with React Server Components (RSC) for minimal client-bundle overhead.

- Service page: [Web Development](https://techmate4u.com/services/web-development)

### Mobile App Development
Native and cross-platform mobile applications built for performance, user engagement, and scalability. We handle Android and iOS development with a focus on smooth animations, offline capability, and clean architecture.

- Service page: [Mobile App Development](https://techmate4u.com/services/mobile-app-development)

### Technical SEO & Site Speed
Organic traffic optimization utilizing semantic HTML, JSON-LD schema markup, and Core Web Vitals refinement. We target sub-1.2s LCP, valid Structured Data for rich snippets, clean site architecture, and WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility compliance.

- Service page: [Technical SEO](https://techmate4u.com/services/technical-seo)

### AI Automation Systems
Tailored AI solutions and automated workflows designed to streamline operations, reduce manual errors, and boost business efficiency. We build LLM-powered agents, document processing pipelines, and API-connected automation systems.

- Service page: [Automation Systems](https://techmate4u.com/services/automation-systems)

### Digital Marketing
Results-driven marketing campaigns and funnel optimizations tailored to scale your brand and maximize acquisition ROI. Includes paid social, Google Ads management, landing page CRO, and performance reporting.

- Service page: [Digital Marketing](https://techmate4u.com/services/digital-marketing)

### Social Media Management
Strategic content creation, community engagement, and brand optimization to build a powerful organic social media presence across LinkedIn, Instagram, X (Twitter), and TikTok.

- Service page: [Social Media Management](https://techmate4u.com/services/social-media-management)

## Key Projects

### Riwaaz Ethnic
Premium ethnic wear e-commerce platform. Rebuilt a legacy storefront with Next.js, achieving a Lighthouse mobile score of 99/100, a +38% conversion lift, and sub-second page transitions.

- Live: [riwaazethnic.vercel.app](https://riwaazethnic.vercel.app/)
- Case study: [techmate4u.com/work/riwaaz-ethnic](https://techmate4u.com/work/riwaaz-ethnic)

### Lab2Door
Healthcare logistics platform for patient scheduling and medical lab routing. Delivered a 50% reduction in booking friction, zero slot collisions, and 2.5x growth in scheduled appointments.

- Live: [lab2door.vercel.app](https://lab2door.vercel.app/)
- Case study: [techmate4u.com/work/lab2door](https://techmate4u.com/work/lab2door)

### Restaurant Management & POS
Custom hospitality management system with real-time kitchen sync, touch-optimized waiter interfaces, and table-side ordering. Achieved sub-100ms kitchen sync latency and a 22% faster table turnover rate.

- Case study: [techmate4u.com/work/restaurant-management](https://techmate4u.com/work/restaurant-management)

## How We Work (Process)

1. **Discovery & Research** — Analyzing your goals, target audience, and current technical landscape to define project requirements.
2. **Proposal & Quote** — Delivering a comprehensive project scope, timeline, and transparent pricing structure.
3. **Agreement Signed** — Finalizing contract terms and establishing clear milestones.
4. **Initial Payment** — Securing resources, aligning our engineering team, and officially kicking off.
5. **Design Phase** — Creating wireframes, user flows, and high-fidelity visual prototypes for your approval.
6. **Development** — Building the solution using modern, scalable frameworks and rigorous coding standards.
7. **Revisions & Testing** — QA, performance testing, and iterative client feedback rounds.
8. **Final Delivery** — Deploying to production, final code review, and handover.
9. **Support & Maintenance** — Ongoing updates, uptime monitoring, and proactive technical support.

## Technology Stack

- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Supabase, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
- CMS: Sanity, Contentful
- Payments: Stripe
- AI: OpenAI, Anthropic APIs, LangChain
- Deployment: Vercel, AWS
